title: Rey Shikufu's vanilla Tweaked pack
description: A pack of several mods to provide utilities and performance boost for Vanilla gameplay
body:
**DISCLAIMER**: Ask your server admin about the usage of many of these mods, this modpack provides tools such as free camera, schematics, auto clickers, map and mini map.

This modpack provides several mods, a resource pack and a pre-configuration of said mods for utility and performance purposes. Some keybinds aren't the originals since it conflicts in-between the mods. Links for all the mods and their references are provided bellow.

It also tries to have some parity with performance and feature with Optifine.

A pre-configured Vanilla Tweaks resource pack is provided. You may replace it a new pack with the VTdownloader mod. 

Performance:

- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds)
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
- [Dashloader](https://modrinth.com/mod/dashloader)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Ferrite-core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Lazydfu](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Phosphor](https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphor)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)

Quality of life:

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Boosted Brightness](https://modrinth.com/mod/boosted-brightness)
- [Carpet](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carpet)
- [Controlling](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controlling)
- [Item Scroller](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-scroller)
- [Inventory HUD+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)
- [Light Overlay](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/light-overlay)
- [Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica/)
- [Litematica Printer](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica-printer)
- [MiniHUD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minihud)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [No Telemetry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-telemetry)
- [Reese's Sodium Option](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Syncmatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/syncmatica)
- [Tweakeroo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tweakeroo)
- [WorldEdit](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap/)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)

Resource pack:
- [VTdownloader](https://modrinth.com/mod/vtdownloader/)
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

Optifine Parity:
- [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)
- [Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)

Modified Keybinds:

- **+** is used for adding a waypoint from Xaero's minimap
- **Right Alt** is used to open Xaero's World Map
- **lots of unbinded keys**

**You should** take a look at the mods configuration to tweak it as your liking. This config is made with a full QWERTY keyboard in mind.
